Republican support for bombing Iran was 53% (Quinnipiac 1/14) then shot up to ~85-90% after Trump attacked Iran on 2/28. So there is a vague current of antiwar sentiment within the GOP but the lesson is it’s superficial and easily jettisoned whenever their cult leader goes neocon


Gabe Fleisher (@WakeUp2Politics)

NEW: There is no MAGA split on Iran.

Poll after poll show that ~85-90% of MAGA Republicans support the US strikes on Iran. 

*Many* news outlets ran with stories from Tucker, Bannon,
